architecture.summary: Existing eval engine (src/eval/) with sequential LLM calls, eval-server (HTTP+SSE), React eval-ui (Vite). Concurrency.ts semaphore exists but unused. 5 providers in llm.ts. Adding OpenRouter as 6th. Parallel execution via Promise.allSettled for cases, Promise.all for judges. Separate judgeModel config. Sweep results stored in evals/leaderboard/. Integration runner uses Playwright with Chrome profiles.

integrations.summary: OpenRouter API (openai-compatible, OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var, /api/v1/chat/completions). Chrome profiles for browser-based integration tests (social media posting via MCP). Playwright for browser automation. Credential storage: .env.local -> env vars -> OS keychain. API keys for non-browser skills (Slack, GitHub).

ui-ux.summary: Leaderboard table with pass rate, rubric, duration, sparkline trends, Best Model badge. Unit [U] blue badges vs integration [I] amber badges. Lock icon for missing credentials. Filter tabs for unit/integration. Model search/autocomplete dropdown. Platform shows unit-only with Studio CTA for integration.

performance.summary: Core focus of Pillar 1. Current: 25-35 sequential calls = 12min. Target: 4-6x speedup via semaphore-gated concurrency (default 5). Tiered judge model (Haiku for judging). Judge cache by hash(assertion, output). --concurrency N CLI flag. Rate limit safety cap.

security.summary: Credential storage LOCAL ONLY (.env.local gitignored -> env vars -> OS keychain). Secret-scanning pre-flight rejects evals.json with token patterns. Test account isolation. [VSKILL-TEST-] content prefix. Dry-run mode. Confirmation prompts. No API keys in evals.json. Browser sessions via Chrome profiles (no tokens stored).

edge-cases.summary: API 429 rate limits need retry-with-backoff. SSE progress interleaving with parallel calls. Partial failure tolerance via Promise.allSettled. Cleanup on Ctrl+C for integration tests. Orphaned post cleanup. Per-platform rate limiting (X: 3/min, LinkedIn: 2/min). OpenRouter down = clear error, no auto-fallback. Judge model weaker than gen model = warning. Chrome profile not found = clear error.
